seoTitle: How to Connect Shopify to Brevo Easily (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to install the official Brevo app in your Shopify store, sync customer data, and enable abandoned cart tracking automatically.
intro: Manually exporting customer data from Shopify to keep your Brevo contacts in sync is slow and error-prone. This guide covers installing Brevo's official app from the Shopify App Store, authenticating your accounts, and turning on real-time syncing for customer profiles, checkout events, and purchase data. It's built for store owners who want automated abandoned cart recovery without writing any code.

steps.heading: Install the Brevo app
steps.body: In your Shopify admin, go to Apps, search for Brevo, select the official listing, and click Install app.

steps.heading: Authorize the connection
steps.body: Review the requested data access permissions, click Install, then connect and log into your Brevo account when redirected.

steps.heading: Choose your Brevo workspace
steps.body: Select the specific Brevo organization you want to bind to your Shopify storefront.

steps.heading: Enable contact syncing
steps.body: Toggle on automatic real-time customer data synchronization and choose which target list will house your store signups.

steps.heading: Turn on transactional tracking
steps.body: Enable order history and abandoned cart data tracking, review your field mappings, and save your settings to complete the integration.

faq.question: Does the Shopify integration sync in real time?
faq.answer: Yes, Brevo's connector uses automated webhooks to sync customer profiles, checkout events, and purchase data continuously.

faq.question: Can I set up abandoned cart automations after connecting?
faq.answer: Yes, once transactional tracking is enabled, abandoned cart data flows into Brevo where you can build automated recovery sequences.

faq.question: How do I know the integration is working correctly?
faq.answer: Check the Integrations panel in your Brevo dashboard for a green active indicator confirming your Shopify connection.

faq.question: Will customer opt-in preferences carry over from Shopify?
faq.answer: Yes, checkout newsletter checkboxes can be mapped to specific marketing lists to respect subscriber consent.
